name: Saucy Sardine
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp chopped green onion (both white and green parts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use both the green and white parts of the green onion when chopping.
2. Mash the sardine fillets with a fork, then blend in the sour cream and mayonnaise until well combined.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (green onion, parsley, and lemon juice) and blend again to ensure everything is thoroughly mixed.
4. Cover the mixture and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Makes about 1 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Broccoli, Cabbage, Cherry Tomatoes, Carrots, Pita Triangles, Cocktail Rye Bread, Water Crackers
